author: maxine--futura
content: Migrated from chainlink issue #769. Root cause: anonymous Atmosphere client defaults to bsky.social AppView which doesn't index custom lexicon records (ac.foundation.dataset.*), returning 400 RecordNotFound. Authenticated client works because it routes to actual PDS. Additionally, get_record() always sends to authenticated user's PDS — cross-account resolution is broken. Fix options: (1) resolve target DID's PDS via plc.directory, (2) always use AppView for reads, (3) detect foreign DID and route through AppView.
